author: Netflix Anime
text:
Gero makes an impression #MARRIAGETOXIN
During an undercover protection mission, Gero performs a party trick that leaves audiences shocked.

Catch more of Gero's extraordinary feats in MARRIAGETOXIN, with new weekly episodes now playing on Netflix in select regions of Asia.
https://www.netflix.com/title/82758413 

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/33okaL0

text:
Don't Mess With Shishiba's Ramen | SAKAMOTO DAYS | Clip | Netflix Anime

More chaotic moments await in SAKAMOTO DAYS, now playing on Netflix!
